programme.title: Lake Front Luxury
programme.desc: Bone up on dog-friendly options with a couple who love to spoil their pooch.

programme.title: Lake Front Luxury
programme.desc: Mix it up with a blended family who want to kick back and spend time together.

programme.title: Lake Front Luxury
programme.desc: Go wild with a pair of city slickers who are ready for rural peace and quiet.

programme.title: Lien on Me
programme.desc: See the Holmes on Homes crew fix a financial mess left by a shady contractor.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Cast a light on all the fixable issues in a young family’s ice-cold new house.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Travel back to Sean and Carol’s home, where a warm, safe welcome awaits them.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Examine an upsized upgrade that’s been nothing but trouble for a young family.

programme.title: Holmes Inspection
programme.desc: Keep the peace in a multi-generational home full of conflicting needs.

programme.desc: Visit the bustling job site, then get a lesson in local wetlands preservation.

programme.title: Holmes in New Orleans
programme.desc: Celebrate the happy result of weeks of hard work as Gloria finally comes home.

programme.desc: Blow the lid off the myth that a newly constructed house is always better.
